channel.title: RightSpend Blog - AWS Cost Optimization
channel.description: Expert insights on AWS cost optimization, FinOps automation, and cloud savings strategies. Learn how companies reduce their AWS bill by 20-55%.

item.title: AWS Due Diligence: Why PE Firms Should Scan Cloud Spend Before the LOI
item.description: How a 24-hour AWS scan before the LOI gives PE deal teams a specific dollar figure and a post-close execution plan. Khoros case study: $3M waste found in 72 hours.

item.title: Private Equity AWS Cost Optimization: The $17-29M Value Capture Most Deal Teams Miss
item.description: How PE firms use automated AWS optimization to create $17-29M in equity value within 180 days of close — with zero engineering effort and no lock-in.

item.title: AWS Savings Plans Optimization: Maximize Savings Without Overcommitting
item.description: Complete guide to optimizing AWS Savings Plans — avoid common mistakes, choose the right plan type, and discover automated alternatives.

item.title: How to Use AWS Cost Explorer: Understand Your AWS Bill in 30 Minutes
item.description: Step-by-step guide to the 5 Cost Explorer views that actually matter. Find waste, track savings, and understand your cloud spending.

item.title: Automated AWS Cost Reduction: How to Cut Your Cloud Bill Without Lifting a Finger
item.description: How automated AWS cost reduction works — and why companies using it save 20-55% without manual effort. Full guide with comparisons.

item.title: AWS Reserved Instances Alternative: CFDs Offer 40-55% Savings Without Lock-In
item.description: The flexible alternative to AWS Reserved Instances. Get 40-55% EC2 savings with zero lock-in, zero upfront cost, and automatic adjustments.

item.title: What is AWS Cost Optimization? The Finance Leader's Guide
item.description: AWS cost optimization can reduce your cloud bill by 20-55%. Plain English guide for CFOs and budget owners.

item.title: CloudFix Reviews: Companies Saving Up To 55% On AWS Costs
item.description: Real results from enterprises, SaaS platforms, and retail companies using automated AWS optimization.

item.title: AWS Tools Comparison: CloudFix vs RIs vs Savings Plans
item.description: Side-by-side comparison of AWS cost optimization tools with actual cost breakdowns.

item.title: Commitment Free Discounts Explained: How CFDs Work
item.description: Complete guide to CFDs — 40-55% AWS savings without 3-year lock-ins, with real examples.

item.title: 7 AWS Billing Mistakes That Cost Companies Millions in 2025
item.description: The most expensive AWS billing mistakes and proven strategies to prevent catastrophic cloud cost overruns.

item.title: How to Reduce AWS Costs by 30% in 30 Days (2025)
item.description: Step-by-step action plan to achieve 30% AWS cost reduction in just 30 days.

item.title: FinOps Automation in 2025: Eliminate 90% of Manual Cost Management
item.description: Enterprise guide to FinOps automation with 582% ROI calculations and real case studies.

item.title: How to Reduce AWS Costs Immediately: 10 Proven Strategies
item.description: Immediate AWS savings strategies you can implement today.

item.title: AWS Reserved Instances vs Savings Plans: Complete 2024 Comparison
item.description: Comprehensive analysis of RIs vs Savings Plans with cost calculations.

item.title: CloudFix and RightSpend Integration: Complete AWS Cost Optimization Strategy
item.description: How combining CloudFix resource optimization with RightSpend EC2 discounts creates the ultimate cost management solution.
